title: polygala brevialata
intro: Polygala brevialata, also known as small milkwort, is a perennial plant belonging to the milkwort family (Polygalaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Polygala brevialata include its ability to soothe coughs, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of allergies. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used in folk medicine, although its efficacy and safety have not been extensively scientifically studied.
